title: Set up Auth0 authentication in a Next.js project
summary: Complete Auth0 setup for Next.js — SDK install, environment config, middleware, login/logout routes, session handling, and role-based access control.
declaration: I will set up Auth0 as the authentication provider. Auth0 supports social logins, enterprise SSO, MFA, and fine-grained RBAC out of the box. If you prefer Clerk or NextAuth instead, say so before I begin.
